'''dhajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backbreakingly|backbreakingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backbreakingly|backbreakingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhajate|dhajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhajatesher|dhajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajatesherĂ«m|dhajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhajatero|dhajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhajateshĂ«|dhajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajateshĂ«m|dhajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhajatero|gokidhajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhajateshĂ«|gokidhajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhajateshĂ«m|gokidhajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhajankerom|godhajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhajankeshĂ«|godhajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhajankeshĂ«m|godhajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhajankeya|godhajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhajaterom|dhajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajatemu|dhajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhajateya|dhajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhajaterom|gokidhajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhajatemu|gokidhajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhajateya|gokidhajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhajajate|dhajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhajajatesher|dhajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajajatesherĂ«m|dhajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhajajatero|dhajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhajajateshĂ«|dhajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajajateshĂ«m|dhajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhajajatero|gokidhajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhajajateshĂ«|gokidhajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhajajateshĂ«m|gokidhajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhajajankerom|godhajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhajajankeshĂ«|godhajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhajajankeshĂ«m|godhajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhajajankeya|godhajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhajajaterom|dhajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajajatemu|dhajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhajajateya|dhajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhajajaterom|gokidhajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhajajatemu|gokidhajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhajajateya|gokidhajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠjĂŠte|dhĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠjĂŠtesher|dhĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠjĂŠtero|dhĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠjĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠjĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠjĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠjĂŠterom|dhĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠjĂŠtemu|dhĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠjĂŠteya|dhĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠjĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠjĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafjafte|dhafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafjaftesher|dhafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafjaftesherĂ«m|dhafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafjaftero|dhafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafjafteshĂ«|dhafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafjafteshĂ«m|dhafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafjaftero|gokidhafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafjafteshĂ«|gokidhafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafjafteshĂ«m|gokidhafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafjafnkerom|godhafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafjafnkeshĂ«|godhafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafjafnkeshĂ«m|godhafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafjafnkeya|godhafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafjafterom|dhafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafjaftemu|dhafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafjafteya|dhafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafjafterom|gokidhafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafjaftemu|gokidhafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafjafteya|gokidhafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
